description: Adds a localhost bridge inside MattsSDKBoostingTools and an external UI layout registry for the first standalone control panel prototype.
notes: The external app reads the layout from the in-game SDK bridge.
The game and SDK mod must be running; the EXE/Python UI is a remote control, not a replacement for the SDK backend.
Action execution is queued onto the SDK tick hook to avoid direct game calls from the HTTP server thread.
